title: Notification
description: A component that displays toast notifications with support for different types (success, error, warning, info), custom content, action buttons, auto-dismissal, and pause-on-hover functionality. It provides a non-intrusive way to show important messages to users.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the notification service to display a basic notification

sections.title: Asynchronous Process
sections.description: Demonstrates notifications with action buttons and async operations

sections.title: Custom Content
sections.description: Shows how to use custom templates and components as notification content

sections.title: Different Locations
sections.description: Demonstrates all available notification positions on screen

sections.title: Timeout and Progress
sections.description: Shows timeout features, progress bars, and pause-on-hover functionality

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Demonstrates programmatic control, dynamic buttons, and advanced interactions

types.title: AXNotificationComponent
types.description: The main component for displaying notifications

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: config
props.description: The notification configuration data injected via DIALOG_DATA.

props.name: dialogRef
props.description: Dialog reference for managing the notification lifecycle.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Closes the dialog and provides the component and HTML element for reference.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Shows a notification with the specified configuration options.
 *
 * @param config - Configuration options for the notification including content, title, color, location, buttons, etc.
 * @returns AXNotificationRef - Reference to the created notification for programmatic control.
 */
show(config: AXNotificationOptions): AXNotificationRef

/**
 * Hides all active notifications and clears the reserved notification queue.
 */
hideAll(): void
